{{CargoRelic
|name=Zizhi Tongjian
|class_id=22629
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|birthday=08-03
|source=
|description=On Aug 3, 959 AD, Sima Guang completed the compilation of the "Zizhi Tongjian."<br>"Zizhi Tongjian" is a work of Chinese history completed by the Northern Song historian Sima Guang over a period of 19 years. Its content spans nearly 300 volumes and covers 1,300 years of history from 16 different dynasties. Sima Guang drew on examples from the book to summarize a large amount of experience and lessons for future generations to reference. In this work, Sima Guang also integrated the characteristics of biographical history and created a new multifunctional cataloging method for chronological history, greatly improving the level of historical compilation. Its rich and detailed content makes it an immortal masterpiece on par with "Shi Ji."
|fame=108
|art=63
|fth=51
|civ=73
|tech=67
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>All Minion DEF +0.6%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +9
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>All Minion DEF +0.8%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +18
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>All Minion DEF +1%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +27
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>All Minion DEF +1.4%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +45
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>All Minion DEF +1.8%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +63
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>All Minion DEF +2.4%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>All Minion DEF +2.4%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Dragon Orb Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Purple Card Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's FAME +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Chronicle the event|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Research Briefcase, +2|orange}}
|3name=Officer Liu|3rec=92.66M|3atk=298349|3defense=174255|3hp=23070327|3weak=38309
|4name=Historian Liu|4rec=102.65M|4atk=320709|4defense=188319|4hp=27420226|4weak=40232
|5name=Historian Sima|5rec=114.62M|5atk=346871|5defense=205158|5hp=34202503|5weak=43042
|6name=Emperor Shenzong of Song|6rec=129.38M|6atk=378612|6defense=225924|6hp=43577934|6weak=46345
|Arec=148.63M|Aatk=421889|Adefense=253009|Ahp=59554368|Aweak=50104
}}}}
